title: Issuance of shares; consideration
doc_html:
§52.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1.  Amended by Acts 1974, No. 436, §1; Acts 1997, No. 914, §1; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
